queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the absence of a checking account as a determinant of elevated credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of maintaining minimal savings balances below 100 DM on credit default likelihood.
Empirical analysis of extended loan duration in months as a credit risk driver contributing to increased default probability.
